title: Thermodynamic Uncertainty Relation Sets Precision Limit of Bacterial Cell Size Control
field_a: Stochastic thermodynamics — thermodynamic uncertainty relation, entropy production bounds
field_c: Bacterial cell biology — cell size homeostasis via the adder model
bridge_concepts: TUR bound: CV^2 x entropy_production_rate x cycle_time >= 2kT
Growth rate as dissipation proxy (confirmed 2025 Nature Comms)
Prediction: CV^2 vs 1/(growth_rate x tau) must fall on or above TUR bound
Nutrient-dependent precision degradation as thermodynamic necessity
DnaA-ATP accumulation as molecular current counter with TUR-bounded counting precision

title: Classical Nucleation Theory Predicts Ferritin Iron Release Catastrophe in Ferroptosis
field_a: Physical chemistry — classical nucleation theory, Ostwald ripening, nanoparticle dissolution kinetics
field_c: Ferroptosis biology — ferritin-bound to labile iron pool transition
bridge_concepts: Gibbs-Thomson equation for ferrihydrite core solubility vs radius
Critical nucleus size for dissolution: r_c = 2*gamma*V_m/(RT*ln(S))
Ostwald ripening between ferritin molecules with different iron loads
NCOA4-mediated ferritinophagy pH drop (7.4->4.5) shifts r_c quantitatively
Dissolution rate law: J = k_diss x (S-1) x (A/V)

title: Jamming Phase Diagram Unifies Chromatin Compaction States
field_a: Granular physics — jamming transition, Liu-Nagel phase diagram, Edwards entropy
field_c: Chromatin biology — higher-order chromatin compaction and eu/heterochromatin transitions
bridge_concepts: Liu-Nagel axes: packing fraction (histone modifications), temperature (thermal fluctuations), stress (nuclear lamina confinement)
Edwards entropy counting mechanically stable chromatin configurations
Jamming criticality: coordination number z=z_c at eu/hetero boundary
Fragility: heterochromatin near boundaries yields under small mechanical perturbation
